allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('count:', d['count']\); print\('next:', d['next']\); print\('previous:', d['previous']\); [print\(' -', r['name']\) for r in d['results']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('count:', d['count']\); [print\(' -', r['name']\) for r in d['results']]")
